title: premna gracillima
intro: Premna gracillima, also known as Indian sage or purple premna, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Premna gracillima include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues.
